Z.name: Landmine Scan & Fix
Z.description: Find and fix components that are implemented but not wired through production code paths

key_decisions: ToolExecutionRecorder: added to AgentExecutor, threaded from Runtime, wired recording calls in harness (record_start + record_complete/record_failed per tool execution)
ContextBudgetManager/ContextPruner/LoopGuard: explicitly passed to AgentLoopConfig instead of relying on ..Default::default() fallback
CredentialResolver + Vault: initialized in AgentRuntime with optional OCTO_VAULT_PASSWORD env var for AES-GCM encrypted vault
InMemoryWorkingMemory confirmed as correct design choice — SqliteWorkingMemory shares one table, would cause cross-session data pollution

Enhanced deferred-scan skill with Landmine Scan (Step 0-B): 4 scan patterns for ..Default::default() field swallowing, None for real components, InMemory/Noop in production, unused .with_xxx() builders

deferred.description: octo root migrate — auto-migrate legacy DB locations to new OctoRoot layout
deferred.precondition: When users need automated migration from legacy paths
When multi-project config management is needed

deferred.description: Dependency graph topo-sort wiring — no builtin skills use dependencies currently
deferred.precondition: When skills with inter-dependencies are added

deferred.description: CredentialResolver integration into provider config — resolve API keys from Vault instead of raw env vars
deferred.precondition: When secret management UX is designed (master password source: keyring/config/interactive)

notes: Phase Z complete. 5 landmines fixed: ToolExecutionRecorder wired to harness, budget/pruner/loop_guard explicitly passed, CredentialResolver+Vault initialized in Runtime. deferred-scan skill enhanced with Landmine Scan capability.

previous_phase.name: Phase Y — Playbook Skill SubAgent Wiring
